input:
Immediately, Jamīl was doing his act, telling everybody. ʿUmar was near at hand, confirming the fact with a challenging attitude. A number of men went up to him and he fought them single-handed for an hour or so. Worn out, he sat down and said: “You may do as you like. Had we been three hundred in number, I swear we would have fought it out with you to the bitter end.” At that moment, a wise old man from the Quraysh came along.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 11: Hope and Despair

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 11: Hope and Despair

characters.name: ʿUmar ibn Al-Khattab
characters.appearance: Mid 40s, athletic build, strong features. Thick black beard, short and neatly trimmed. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, simple brown woolen cloak, head uncovered. Worn leather sandals. Confident posture, direct gaze.

characters.name: Jamīl ibn Ma'mar
characters.appearance: Late 30s, medium build, dark complexion. Thick black hair, short and neatly trimmed. Wearing simple white thobe, head uncovered. Worn leather sandals. Confident posture, challenging attitude.

characters.name: Abu Jahl
characters.appearance: Early 60s, slender build, grey-streaked beard. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, simple black woolen cloak, head uncovered. Worn leather sandals. Wise, aged expression.

characters.name: Men of Quraysh
characters.appearance: Varied ages, medium build, dark complexions. Wearing simple white thobes, head uncovered. Worn leather sandals. Indistinct features, grouped together.

output.moral_lesson: Courage in the face of adversity is a key quality of a true believer.
output.narrative_text: ʿUmar stood up to the men of Quraysh who were challenging him, fighting them single-handed for an hour. Worn out, he sat down and said, "Had we been three hundred, I swear we would have fought it out with you to the end."

compliance.notes: No prophets present in the scene. ʿUmar and Jamīl shown with full faces. Wise old man from Quraysh shown with full face. No graphic violence, only a suggestion of a fight.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Outdoor setting in ancient Makkah. ʿUmar, standing confidently with fists clenched, facing a group of men from Quraysh. The men, varying in age, are shown as silhouettes, with ʿUmar's determined face lit by the sun. In the background, a wise old man from Quraysh, Abu Jahl, approaches with a concerned expression. Simple mud-brick buildings, clay water jugs, and palm trees in the background. Medium shot, eye level. Earthy tones. No modern objects.
